subcodes.first_line: O thou who art settled in the Land of Resignation! Blessed art thou, inasmuch as thou hast detached thyself from all earthly concerns and taken fast hold of the hem of allegiance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استقر فی ارض السکون هنیئا لک بما انقطعت عن کل الشئون و تشبثت بذیل ولاء
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession
